# ctyun_mysql_param_templates (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10033813/10098794





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `engine` (String) mysql版本
- `name` (String) 参数模板名称
- `page_no` (Number) 页码，默认1
- `page_size` (Number) 每页记录数，默认10
- `project_id` (String) 项目ID
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID，默认使用provider配置

### Read-Only

- `param_templates` (Attributes List) 参数实例列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--param_templates))

<a id="nestedatt--param_templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `param_templates`

Read-Only:

- `create_time` (String) 创建时间
- `description` (String) 参数模板描述
- `engine` (String) mysql实例版本
- `id` (Number) 参数模板id
- `is_default` (Number) 属否是默认参参数组
- `name` (String) 参数模板名称
- `parameters` (Attributes List) 参数信息 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--param_templates--parameters))
- `restart` (Boolean) 修改该参数是否需要重启
- `user_id` (Number) 用户id

<a id="nestedatt--param_templates--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `param_templates.parameters`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) 参数描述
- `parameter_id` (Number) 参数id
- `parameter_name` (String) 参数名
- `parameter_value` (String) 参数值，支持更新
- `permit_value` (String) 允许取值范围
- `restart` (Boolean) 修改配置是否需要重启
